reviews.comment:
Los sanitarios realmente estaban muy sucios. Se entienden que son públicos, pero no hay derecho.
Lamentable.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were really dirty. I understand they're public, but it's unacceptable.
Disgraceful.

reviews.comment:
Es una parada obligada en nuestras vacaciones. Disfrutamos del parque mientras cargamos combustible. Atención muy buena!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-stop on our vacation. We enjoyed the park while we refueled. Excellent service!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTNVoydmNREAE

reviews.comment:
es la única estación en 40 km y no tenían agua destilada ni nada parecido para el motor.

(Translated by Google)
It's the only station for 40km and they didn't have distilled water or anything like that for the engine.

reviews.comment:
Pagando con la aplicación de ypf..no emiten ticket "A"..la atención es buena pero la estación deja mucho que desear

(Translated by Google)
Paying with the YPF app...they don't issue "A" tickets...the service is good but the station leaves much to be desired.
